title: malaxis verruculosa
intro: Malaxis verruculosa, also known as the warty green orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Malaxis verruculosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions, or made into tinctures and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
